mapper.select: SELECT id, jar_name, plugin_name, plugin_version, is_disabled, update_url, last_check, installed_at FROM plugin_manager ORDER BY plugin_name
SELECT id, jar_name, plugin_name, plugin_version, is_disabled, update_url, last_check, installed_at FROM plugin_manager WHERE is_disabled = 0 ORDER BY plugin_name
SELECT id, jar_name, plugin_name, plugin_version, is_disabled, update_url, last_check, installed_at FROM plugin_manager WHERE is_disabled = 1 ORDER BY plugin_name
SELECT id, jar_name, plugin_name, plugin_version, is_disabled, update_url, last_check, installed_at FROM plugin_manager WHERE jar_name = #{jarName}
SELECT id, jar_name, plugin_name, plugin_version, is_disabled, update_url, last_check, installed_at FROM plugin_manager WHERE plugin_name = #{pluginName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plugin_manager (jar_name, plugin_name, plugin_version, is_disabled, update_url, last_check) VALUES (#{jarName}, #{pluginName}, #{pluginVersion}, #{isDisabled}, #{updateUrl}, #{lastCheck})
